name: Sunset Routes
short_description: Sunset Routes is an easy and intriguing roguelite game. You can choose your crew, put them in the cabins, select your destination, and set sail. Through a series of choices, you can earn profits during the emergency period of the New World and even decide its fate—unintentionally or on purpose.
detailed_description:
New Game!


Please scroll down to MORE FROM RENKA!


About the Game

Sunset Routes is a simple seafaring rouge-lite game.



First, you need to select your destination, which determines what character you will get and the chance of getting it.





Then you have to select a character, which appears randomly depending on a variety of factors, including the destination itself, characters that can help you get a rare character, etc. The characters you own will determine how much cargo the ship can carry.





There are many kinds of interactions between characters, and you need to either manage your characters in the best way or kick them out from your ship in some way to make the ship carry more cargo.





The money you can earn depends on the amount and types of cargo in the ship and your next destination. Of course, your next destination also determines what cargo you'll be loading onto your ship.





There is a demand for a certain amount of money every 5 turns. How far you will go depends on how quickly and clearly you manage your characters and make a good combination out of them.





There will be multiple endings and achievements, and some of the choices you make during the voyage will affect your final ending.





Hope you enjoy this game.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
